015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.UserNotFoundException;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerStatusUpdateRequest;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UserEnabledUpdateRequest;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UserProfileResponse;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.UserService;
024import java.util.UUID;
025import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
026import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
027import org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;
028import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
029import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.Direction;
030import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
031import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
032import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
033import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PatchMapping;
034import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
035import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
036import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
037import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;
038import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
039
040/**
041 * REST controller for manager-only user administration operations.
042 */
043@RestController
044@RequestMapping("/manager/users")
045public class ManagerUserController {
046
047  private static final int DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20;
048  private static final int DEFAULT_PAGE_NUMBER = 0;
049
050  private final UserService service;
051
052  /**
053   * Creates a controller exposing manager-only user administration operations.
054   *
055   * @param service user service.
056   */
057  @Autowired
058  public ManagerUserController(UserService service) {
059    this.service = service;
060  }
061
062  /**
063   * Returns all user profiles.
064   *
065   * @param pageSize maximum number of results to return per page.
066   * @param pageNumber zero-based page index to return.
067   * @return list of user profiles.
068   */
069  @GetMapping(produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
070  @Transactional(readOnly = true)
071  public Page<UserProfile> getAll(
072      @RequestParam(defaultValue = "" + DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE) int pageSize,
073      @RequestParam(defaultValue = "" + DEFAULT_PAGE_NUMBER) int pageNumber
074  ) {
075    PageRequest pageable = PageRequest.of(
076        pageNumber, pageSize,
077        Sort.by(Direction.ASC, "displayName")
078    );
079    return service.getAll(pageable);
080  }
081
082  /**
083   * Returns a manager-visible user profile response by external identifier.
084   *
085   * @param externalId user external ID.
086   * @return manager-visible user profile response.
087   * @throws UserNotFoundException if no user exists with {@code externalId}.
088   */
089  @GetMapping(value = "/{externalId}", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
090  public UserProfileResponse get(@PathVariable UUID externalId) {
091    UserProfile user = service
092        .getByExternalId(externalId)
093        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
094    return service.getUserProfileResponse(user);
095  }
096
097  /**
098   * Sets manager status for a user profile.
099   *
100   * @param externalId user external ID.
101   * @param request request payload containing desired manager flag.
102   * @return updated manager-visible user profile response.
103   */
104  @PatchMapping(
105      value = "/{externalId}/manager-status",
106      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
107      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
108  )
109  public UserProfileResponse updateManagerStatus(
110      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
111      @RequestBody ManagerStatusUpdateRequest request
112  ) {
113    UserProfile user = service.setManagerStatus(externalId, request.isManager());
114    return service.getUserProfileResponse(user);
115  }
116
117  /**
118   * Sets enabled/disabled status for a user profile.
119   *
120   * @param externalId user external ID.
121   * @param request request payload containing desired enabled flag.
122   * @return updated manager-visible user profile response.
123   */
124  @PatchMapping(
125      value = "/{externalId}/enabled",
126      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
127      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
128  )
129  public UserProfileResponse updateEnabled(
130      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
131      @RequestBody UserEnabledUpdateRequest request
132  ) {
133    UserProfile user = service.setEnabled(externalId, request.isEnabled());
134    return service.getUserProfileResponse(user);
135  }
136
137}
